summary: Frontend testing completed for 'Assigned To' multi-select filter feature on Lead Management page. All 12 test cases PASSED. The multi-select dropdown uses Popover and Command components with checkboxes, search functionality, and proper state management.

login_and_navigation.details: Login with admin/Admin2026 successful, navigated to Leads page

dropdown_button_default_state.details: 'Assigned To' dropdown shows as button with 'All' text by default

popover_opens_with_search.details: Clicking dropdown opens Popover with search input ('Search users...') and user list

checkbox_toggle_independent.details: Each user has a checkbox (gold #D4AF37 when selected) that can be toggled independently

single_user_selection.details: Selecting one user shows checkbox checked and button displays user name (e.g., 'Final Test User')

two_users_selection.details: Selecting second user shows both checkboxes checked and button shows '2 selected'

three_users_selection.details: Selecting third user shows button as '3 selected' with footer showing '3 selected'

deselect_user.details: Deselecting a user unchecks the checkbox and updates count (e.g., '3 selected' -> '2 selected')

all_no_filter_option.details: 'All (No Filter)' option at top of list clears all selections when clicked

search_functionality.details: Search input filters user list - typing 'test' shows only users containing 'test' (8 results)

clear_button_footer.details: Clear button in footer (red X icon) clears all selections and resets to 'All'

clear_filters_button.details: Clear Filters button resets 'Assigned To' filter to 'All' and shows all 912 leads

critical_code_review_comments: Multi-select implementation using Popover and Command components is correct and follows shadcn/ui patterns
Checkbox styling with gold (#D4AF37) color matches the app's design system
Footer with selected count and Clear button provides good UX feedback
Search functionality properly filters the user list
Backend integration works correctly - sends comma-separated user IDs for filtering

feature_verification.location: Lead Management page - Filters section (line 1165-1256 in LeadsTable.jsx)
functionality_verified: Search input filters user list in real-time
'All (No Filter)' option at top with gold checkbox when selected
User list shows non-admin users with their roles (e.g., 'agent')
Checkboxes toggle independently without closing dropdown
Button text updates: single user name -> 'X selected' for multiple
Footer shows selected count with Clear button
Clear Filters button resets the filter

context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-select 'Assigned To' filter feature is fully functional. The filter uses Popover/Command components with checkboxes. Key behaviors: 1) Single selection shows user name, 2) Multiple selections show 'X selected', 3) Footer shows count with Clear button, 4) 'All (No Filter)' clears selections, 5) Search filters user list. Backend receives comma-separated user IDs.
